terms.label: AVG
terms.definition: Adequate Vision Generator: creative dialogue system with claim validation.

terms.label: map
terms.definition: A structured working representation that must not be confused with Reality.

terms.label: claim
terms.definition: A statement that requires status, scope, language mode and risk assessment.

terms.label: metaphor
terms.definition: A creative language device useful for thinking but not a literal model unless separately justified.
